name: Teads Holding Co.
business: Teads is a leading omnichannel advertising platform that operates a two-sided marketplace, connecting advertisers (including Fortune 500 brands, agencies, and SMBs) with media owners (premium publishers, CTV apps, and app developers) to drive outcomes across screens.
sellsTo: media owners such as premium publishers

exposures.sentence: We combine these signals with state-of-the-art large-scale AI models to predict full-funnel outcomes for all advertiser types with high precision and low latency.
We believe that our innovative CTV offering is a significant growth driver and enables omnichannel ad campaigns across premium online video and CTV environments.
Our failure or the failure of third parties to protect our sites, networks and systems against security breaches, or otherwise to protect the confidential information of us or our partners;
The proliferation of generative AI tools, particularly their integration into major search engines and web browsers, is causing a shift in how users discover and consume content online.

catalysts.event: Reduction in workforce of approximately 15% as part of Acquisition integration restructuring
catalysts.sentence: On February 3, 2025, in connection with the completion of the Acquisition, the Company announced a restructuring plan (the Plan), as part of its efforts to streamline operations and reduce duplication of roles.

catalysts.event: Commencement of broader strategic restructuring plan to reduce operating costs
catalysts.sentence: On December 3, 2025, the Company commenced a broader strategic restructuring plan (the Strategic Plan) intended to reduce operating costs, improve operating margins and advance the Company’s commitment to profitable growth.

catalysts.event: Repurchase of $9.3 million aggregate principal amount of the 10.000% Senior Secured Notes due 2030
catalysts.sentence: On June 17, 2025, the Company completed the repurchase of $9.3 million aggregate principal amount of the Notes for $8.0 million in cash, including accrued interest, at a discount of approximately 17% to the principal amount of the repurchased Notes.

tamClaims.claim: The key areas where we operate (online video, high-impact display, CTV) are projected to grow from $140 billion in 2023 to $192 billion in 2027, an 8% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: The key areas where we operate, namely online video, high-impact display, and CTV, are projected to grow from $140 billion of spend in 2023 to $192 billion in 2027, an 8% compound annual growth rate (CAGR), with video and CTV being the fastest growing segments, with a 10% and 12% CAGR for 2023 and 2027, respectively, as reflected in a third-party report commissioned by us.
